product: Supervisor Agent is now Generally Available
tagline: Use Supervisor Agent to create a multi agent supervisor system that orchestrates AI agents and tools to work together on complex tasks.
what_it_does: Use Supervisor Agent to create a multi agent supervisor system that orchestrates AI agents and tools to work together on complex tasks. Supervisor Agent is now Generally Available in select US regions for workspaces without Enhanced Security and Compliance features. Databricks has put in place controls to meet the unique compliance needs of highly regulated industries.
why_it_matters: Enhanced security monitoring: Enhanced security monitoring provides the workspace with an enhanced hardened host OS image and additional security monitoring agents to improve your threat detection capabilities.
key_takeaway: Use Supervisor Agent to create a multi agent supervisor system that orchestrates AI agents and tools to work together on complex tasks.
